title: NodeModalResults
description: NodeModalResults: Base class for all Node result classes. Stores all identifier information and how to sort the results in a collection.

UX.description: Translational X component of the mode shape in global coordinates.

UY.description: Translational Y component of the mode shape in global coordinates.

UZ.description: Translational Z component of the mode shape in global coordinates.

RX.description: Rotational component about the X-axis of the mode shape in global coordinates.

RY.description: Rotational component about the Y-axis of the mode shape in global coordinates.

RZ.description: Rotational component about the Z-axis of the mode shape in global coordinates.

NodalMassX.description: Nodal modal mass in the X-direction as defined by orientation basis. Proportional amount of the total modal mass that acts in the X-direction at the specific Node. Property has a quantity of type Mass measured in [kg].

NodalMassY.description: Nodal modal mass in the Y-direction as defined by orientation basis. Proportional amount of the total modal mass that acts in the Y-direction at the specific Node. Property has a quantity of type Mass measured in [kg].

NodalMassZ.description: Nodal modal mass in the Z-direction as defined by orientation basis. Proportional amount of the total modal mass that acts in the Z-direction at the specific Node. Property has a quantity of type Mass measured in [kg].

NodalRotationalMassX.description: Nodal modal mass in the X-direction as defined by orientation basis. Proportional amount of the total modal mass that acts around the X-axis at the specific Node. Property has a quantity of type Mass measured in [kg].

NodalRotationalMassY.description: Nodal modal mass in the Y-direction as defined by orientation basis. Proportional amount of the total modal mass that acts around the X-axis at the specific Node. Property has a quantity of type Mass measured in [kg].

NodalRotationalMassZ.description: Nodal modal mass in the Z-direction as defined by orientation basis. Proportional amount of the total modal mass that acts around the X-axis at the specific Node. Property has a quantity of type Mass measured in [kg].

ModeNumber.description: Positive index, starting at one. Only set for cases with modal outputs such as dynamic cases.

TimeStep.description: Time step for time history results.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
